query:
-- spreadDiff: |modelImplied(awaySpreadOdds) - bookImplied(awaySpreadOdds)| in pp
-- book awaySpreadOdds = +149 → implied = 100/(149+100) = 40.16%
-- mdl  modelAwaySpreadOdds = +207 → implied = 100/(207+100) = 32.57%
-- diff = |32.57 - 40.16| = 7.59pp → but edge is on HOME (SF +1.5)
-- home: book -182 → 182/282 = 64.54%; mdl -207 → 207/307 = 67.43%; diff = 2.89pp
-- We store the BEST edge pp as spreadDiff (positive = edge exists)
-- spreadDiff = 2.89 (home spread edge, PLAYABLE)
-- totalDiff: best of over/under
-- over:  book -105 → 105/205 = 51.22%; mdl +111 → 100/211 = 47.39%; diff = -3.83pp (FADE)
-- under: book -115 → 115/215 = 53.49%; mdl -111 → 111/211 = 52.61%; diff = -0.88pp (NEUTRAL)
-- totalDiff = -0.88 (best is under, NEUTRAL — no edge)
UPDATE games
SET
  spreadDiff = 2.89,
  totalDiff  = -0.88
WHERE id = 2250006;

-- We store the BEST edge pp as spreadDiff (positive = edge exists)

-- totalDiff: best of over/under
